description: Smart flip flops from lotto for the office-goer. Styled to look formal, these flip flops can be worn with jeans or bermudas. Upper Synthetic leather thong style straps with stitch detailing Fabric toe separator for comfort Printed branding on the straps Synthetic leather footbed with cushioning for optimum comfort Outsole TPU outsole with branding and patterned lugs for grip and traction Slipper care Rub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
